_comment: Core, set-agnostic item name mapping (component + completed items). These IDs and names are stable across sets, unlike champions/comps/traits which reset every set. Refreshed by scripts/fetch-ddragon.ts against Riot Data Dragon's tft-item.json — hand edits here are safe but may be overwritten with the same values on next fetch.
TFT_Item_DebugUnitID: Do You Know Who I Am?
TFT14_CypherArmoryItem_Specific5Costs: 2 star Zac, Aurora, Urgot, and Samira
TFT_Augment_GrowingUp_SkipOption:
All Done
Stop transforming, and allow me to star up
TFTEventCT_Encounter_ChoiceItem_Recombob: Recombobulate your board. Gain a reforger.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_Cashout: Spend all %i:Set16Ixtal%. Start a new Quest next round!
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_1UnitAliveQuest: Win @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ player combats with only 1 unit surviving.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_ChampsDiedQuest: Have @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ of your units die in player combats.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_ClearMindQuest: Have an empty bench at the end of combat for @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ rounds.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_ClutteredMindQuest: Have a full bench at the end of combat for @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ rounds.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_LoseBigStreakQuest: Lose @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ player combats in a row.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_LoseSmallStreakQues: Lose @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ player combats in a row.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_LowStreakShortQuest: Alternate winning and losing for @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ player combats.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_TotalGoldQuest: Have @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@+ gold at the end of combat.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_WinStreakShortQuest: Win @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ player combats in a row.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_ZeroGoldQuest: Start combat with zero gold @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ times.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_2CostTankSurviveQue: A 2-Cost Tank survives player combat for @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ seconds.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_TotalArmorQuest: A champion reaches @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ Armor in player combat.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_TotalMRQuest: A champion reaches @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ Magic Resist in combat.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_DamageDealtQuest: A champion deals @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ damage in 1 combat.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_DamageBlockedQuest: A  champion blocks @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ damage in 1 combat.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_123CostQuest: Field a 1-cost, 2-cost, and 3-cost champion for @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ player combats.
TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_1CostFighterTakedow: A 1-cost fighter or assassin scores @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ takedowns in 1 player combat.
